actionLibraryList.title: Mat Scapula Isolation
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with a neutral spine and pelvis. Place your feet hip-width apart on the mat. Extend your arms straight toward the ceiling with palms facing inward. Keep the shoulder blades neutral.
2.Inhale, protract the shoulder blades, creating a stretch between them.
3.Exhale, return the shoulder blades to neutral, extending and stretching the posterior shoulder girdle.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688675769.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower back stable, pressing the sacrum into the mat.\n2.Keep the lower limbs firmly planted and still."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to return the shoulder blades to neutral.
Inhale to protract and stretch between the shoulder blades.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid over-retracting the shoulder blades during the movement.
2.Keep the spine stable; avoid any spinal movement.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Lying Toe Taps
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with arms by your sides. Bend the hips and knees to tabletop position (90°), keeping a neutral spine and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, engage the abdominals, maintain pelvic stability, and lower one leg in a controlled manner, lightly tapping the toes on the floor without moving the torso.
3.Inhale, return the leg to tabletop position.
4.Exhale, switch to the other leg and repeat the toe tap, alternating sides. Maintain core stability and controlled rhythm throughout the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688634189.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower back stable, pressing the sacrum into the mat.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck, allowing them to sink downward."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to engage and lower the leg.
Inhale to return with control.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid arching or sagging the lower back.
2.Do not lower the legs too quickly or use momentum to tap the toes.
3.Keep the shoulders relaxed; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Shoulder Bridg
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with a neutral spine and pelvis, feet hip-width apart on the mat. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, posteriorly tilt the pelvis and articulate the spine sequentially from the tailbone upward, engaging the glutes to lift the hips until full hip extension is achieved.
3.Inhale, maintain the top position, extending through the spine.
4.Exhale, control the descent, articulating the spine sequentially from the thoracic vertebrae down to the sacrum, returning to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688712470.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders and neck, keeping the shoulder blades stable and pressed downward.\n2.Keep the lower limbs firmly planted and still."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to lift and articulate the spine.
Inhale to hold and stabilize the top position.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid rib flaring or pelvic rotation.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and shoulder blades stable; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Low Swan
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie prone with palms on the mat beside the chest, shoulders relaxed away from the ears, elbows naturally bent, and legs extended straight and as close together as possible. Keep the head, neck, and spine aligned. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, engage the abdominals, slide the shoulder blades down, place the forearms on the mat with elbows directly under the shoulders, and extend the spine.
3.Inhale, maintain length at the top, extending the neck along the spine, lifting only as much as is comfortable in the lower back.
4.Exhale, control with the core, and sequentially lower the torso back to the mat. Return to the starting position and repeat.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770690056957.jpg","context":"1.Keep the lower body stable on the mat.\n2.Relax and lower the shoulders and neck."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Inhale to extend and lift.
Exhale to control the descent.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and avoid compensating by pushing forcefully with the arms.
2.Avoid collapsing the lower back or over-compressing the lumbar spine.
3.Avoid lifting the head too high; keep the neck aligned without excessive backward tilt.

actionLibraryList.title: Mat Cat & Cow
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Begin in a quadruped position with hands under the shoulders and knees under the hips. Keep the spine neutral, pelvis stable, and core engaged. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, draw the abdomen inward and upward, tilt the pelvis posteriorly, and sequentially roll the spine from the tailbone, rounding the back to the highest point into Cat Pose.
3.Inhale, return the torso to a neutral position, then sequentially extend the spine from the tailbone to the crown of the head, opening the chest forward into Cow Pose.
4.Exhale, return to neutral and roll again. Flow smoothly between flexion and extension with the breath, maintaining stable shoulder blades and core engagement throughout.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770690119784.jpg","context":"1.Keep the spine and pelvis stable; avoid collapsing the lower back.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck, letting them drop down naturally."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale, engage the abdominals, and flex the spine segment by segment.
Inhale, lengthen and open the spine.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid collapsing the lower back or over-compressing the lumbar spine, maintaining neutral control.
2.Keep the shoulders relaxed and avoid compensating with the arms.
3.Avoid moving only the head or pelvis; ensure the spine moves segment by segment.

actionLibraryList.title: Roll Down Round Back
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, draw the navel toward the spine, tuck the pelvis, and roll backward from the tailbone to form a C-curve in the spine.
2.Continue rolling the spine down, one vertebra at a time, until lying flat on the mat; keep the feet pressed into the mat, avoiding lifting or rocking.
3.Use abdominal engagement to roll the body back up, stacking the spine sequentially to return to a tall, seated position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628521526.jpg","context":"1.Keep the legs together, extended and locked.\n2.Relax the shoulders and neck."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid leaning backward with a straight back.
2.Keep shoulders and neck relaxed—no shrugging or compensation.
3.Keep both feet grounded.

actionLibraryList.title: Roll Down with Bicep Curls
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale, keep the torso in a C-curve, bend the elbows, and pull them backward; keep the upper arms stable.
2.Inhale, resist the cable tension, and slowly extend the arms back to the starting position—avoid letting the cable pull them back too quickly.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628562415.jpg","context":"1.Extend the legs forward.\n2.Keep the torso in a stable C-curve—avoid rocking.\n3.Raise the arms to shoulder height."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to pull.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the body stable—avoid rocking.
2.Keep the arms steady—no swinging.
3.Shoulders down, relaxed.

actionLibraryList.title: Roll Down with Row
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Exhale. Maintain a stable C-curve in the torso and bend the elbows to pull back horizontally.
2.Inhale. Slowly extend the arms back to the starting position against the cable resistance, avoiding a quick snap back.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628614179.jpg","context":"1.Extend both legs straight forward, together and locked.\n2.Lean the torso back about 45°, supported on the sacrum.\n3.Lift the arms to shoulder height, extended out to the sides."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Body stable, no swaying.
2.Shoulders and arms level.
3.Shoulders down and relaxed.

actionLibraryList.title: Roll Down with Twist Row
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Roll the torso down and lean back to about 45°, supported and stable. Exhale as you bend the right elbow and pull back, rotating the head and thoracic spine to look to the right. Inhale to return to center.
2.Exhale to pull back with the left elbow, rotating the thoracic spine to look left. Inhale to slowly return the straps. Alternate sides.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628596376.jpg","context":"1.Extend both legs straight forward with legs together and locked.\n2.Lean the torso back about 45°, supported on the sacrum.\n3.Raise the arms to shoulder height, extended out to the sides."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid any up-and-down body movement.
2.Keep both feet on the ground.
3.Avoid shrugging your shoulders.

actionLibraryList.title: Supine Leg Scissors
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back with your core engaged and both legs lifted about 30° off the floor. Inhale to prepare; exhale as one leg extends upward toward the ceiling while the other lowers with control toward the floor, keeping the pelvis stable.
2.Inhale as the legs switch positions in the air, maintaining length and control, continuing the scissor-like alternation.
3.Optionally, flex the toes upward or point them downward to increase activation of the posterior or anterior leg muscles.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627136008.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders and neck.\n2.Keep the pelvis stable, with the lower back pressed gently into the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale, engage the core, and lower one leg with control.
Inhale, extend and switch both legs.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the hips and lower limbs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid sagging or arching the lower back.
2.Do not lower too quickly; maintain control.

actionLibraryList.title: Parallel Press
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back in tabletop position, keeping the legs together and core engaged. Exhale as you extend the legs and lower them toward the floor, keeping them close to the ground.
2.Inhale, flexing the hips to lift the legs back up to the bent-knee, bent-hip position.
3.Keep the core engaged and stable, moving with a smooth, controlled rhythm; avoid using momentum.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627031254.jpg","context":"1.Press the lower back into the mat and lengthen the spine away from the tailbone.\n2.Let the shoulders and shoulder blades naturally sink toward the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to extend the legs with force.
Inhale to bend the knees and return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the lower body and core.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid rocking or letting the lower back sag.
2.Avoid shrugging the shoulders or tensing the neck.
3.Maintain controlled strength; do not use momentum.

actionLibraryList.title: Lying Alternating Leg Press
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie on your back in a table-top position, with the arms relaxed at your sides. Keep the pelvis stable and pressed into the mat. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale and extend one leg downward, lowering it to about 45° or slightly below, while keeping the lumbar spine and torso stable.
3.Inhale, engaging the core and hips to control the leg as it returns. Exhale and repeat on the other side, alternating legs.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627477073.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders and neck.\n2.Keep the pelvis stable, with the lower back pressed close to the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to extend. 
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the hips and lower limbs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid sagging or arching the lower back.
2.Avoid using momentum to extend or return too quickly.

actionLibraryList.title: Supine Leg Helicopter
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale to prepare while lying on your back, engaging the core and lifting both legs about 30° off the floor.
2.Exhale as you perform the scissor legs: one leg rises toward vertical while the other lowers with control.
3.Inhale as the legs switch positions in the air, completing the second scissor.
4.Exhale: when the legs reach their farthest points, open them outward in a circular motion; inhale to bring them back together along the scissor path and continue the movement.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770627151926.jpg","context":"1.Relax the shoulders and neck.\n2.Keep the pelvis stable, with the lower back gently pressed into the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale, engage the core, and perform the scissor legs with outward circular motion.
Inhale as the legs extend and switch positions, maintaining stability.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the hips and lower limbs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the pelvis stable; avoid sagging or arching the lower back.
2.Do not lower too quickly; maintain control.

actionLibraryList.title: Breaststroke Arm Lift
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale. Start with the arms naturally bent at the sides of the waist. Exhale, engage the shoulders and arms to push the arms straight overhead.
2.Inhale. Keep the shoulders and back engaged, control the arms as they open out to the sides at shoulder height, feeling the eccentric stretch.
3.Exhale. Engage the shoulders to lift the arms overhead. Inhale, control the lowering back to shoulder height.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770632489020.jpg","context":"1.Keep the neck neutral and extended, with shoulders down.\n2.Engage the abdominal muscles."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Neutral spine, no sagging.
2.Neck neutral, no excessive extension.
3.Shoulders down, no shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Breaststroke Press with Back Extension
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale. Start with the arms naturally bent at the sides of the waist. Exhale, engage the shoulders to push the arms straight overhead, engaging the upper back so that the upper thoracic spine extends upward.
2.Inhale. Maintain back tension, slowly lower the chest with control, and guide the handles back to the starting position, feeling the eccentric stretch as the muscles lengthen.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770632527756.jpg","context":"1.Keep the neck neutral and extended, with shoulders down.\n2.Engage the core."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage the shoulders, back, and core.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Shoulders down, no shrugging.
2.Pelvis and lower body stable.

actionLibraryList.title: Breaststroke
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale. Lie prone, extend the spine, stretch both arms forward and legs backward, and engage the core.
2.Exhale. Keep the core stable, lift the chest and legs off the mat simultaneously, maintaining body extension and balance.
3.Inhale. Hold balance and stability at the top. Exhale, eccentrically control the back as you lower to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770632569558.jpg","context":"1.Keep the neck neutral and extended, with shoulders down.\n2.Engage the core."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale on effort.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the neck neutral; avoid excessive extension.
2.Keep the shoulders down; avoid shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: Feet Pulling Hamstring Curl
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie prone with the pelvis stable against the mat and the abdominals lightly engaged. Bring the legs together, bending the knees to about 90° toward the ceiling. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, keeping one leg straight and stable while the other leg performs a controlled hamstring curl, bringing the heel toward the glutes. Keep the pelvis stable.
3.Inhale, control the leg as it returns to the starting bent position.
4.Exhale, switch legs and repeat the single-leg curl, maintaining rhythm and stability.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688352977.jpg","context":"1.Keep the spine stable in a neutral position.\n2.Keep the core and pelvis stable, maintaining contact with the mat at all times."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to engage and curl the leg.
Inhale to control the return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid anterior pelvic tilt or compensating with the lower back.
2.Do not swing the leg with momentum; ensure the hamstrings are engaged.
3.Maintain consistent rhythm and equal effort on both sides.

actionLibraryList.title: Feet Pulling Alternation
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lie prone with the pelvis stable on the mat and the abdominals lightly engaged. Keep the legs together, knees bent at about 90° pointing toward the ceiling. Inhale to prepare.
2.Exhale, keeping one leg straight and stable while engaging the hamstring of the other leg to bend the knee, bringing the heel toward the glutes in a controlled manner without rocking the pelvis.
3.Inhale to return the leg to the starting bent position with control.
4.Exhale, switch legs, and repeat the single-leg curl, maintaining rhythm and stability.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770688369601.jpg","context":"1.Keep the spine neutral and the pelvis stable.\n2.Keep the thighs stable and pressed against the mat."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to curl with force.
Inhale to control the return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid anterior pelvic tilt or compensating with the lower back.
2.Do not swing the legs with momentum; ensure the hamstrings are actively engaged.
3.Maintain consistent rhythm and even effort on both sides.

actionLibraryList.title: Standing Punch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Inhale prepare exhale step one leg forward opposite hand push forward.
2.Inhale press through front foot return to start under core control control arms back.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628849832.jpg","context":"1.Core stable spine neutral.\n2.Knees aligned with toes.\n3.Shoulders relaxed down."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate:
Exhale to work.
Inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Pelvis stable no tilt or rotation.
2.Knees out no collapse.
3.Shoulders down no shrug.

actionLibraryList.title: Standing Butterfly
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lengthen the body upward.
2.Exhale, keeping the lower body stable, bend the torso to one side; sweep the upper arm in an arc while pulling the lower arm toward the floor.
3.Inhale, and slowly return to the neutral position with control.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770628864577.jpg","context":"1.Keep the torso stable.\n2.Maintain the shoulders in a relaxed, lowered position.\n3.Keep the arms fully extended."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Maintain steady, even breathing
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders down—do not shrug.
2.Maintain a stable center of gravity—do not shift your weight.
3.Ensure proper control throughout the movement.

actionLibraryList.title: Glutes Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, lower the shoulder blades, and relax the neck. Bring one leg forward, bending at the hip and knee, and extend the other leg back with the thigh on the mat. Keep the hips facing forward without tilting.
2.Inhale to lengthen the spine and level the pelvis. Exhale as you hinge forward from the hips, resting the forearms or forehead lightly on the mat. Maintain the back hip extended forward without collapsing the lower back, feeling a stretch through the hips and glutes. Breathe evenly while holding the stretch.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691212351.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine and stable pelvis, avoiding any tilting."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly while in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch in the hips.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.
2.Maintain a neutral spine and avoid tilting the pelvis.

actionLibraryList.title: Hamstring Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit tall on the mat with legs extended together or hip-width apart. Flex the feet, lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, lengthen the spine, and let the shoulders relax down.
2.Inhale to prepare, reaching forward to hold the ankles. Exhale as you hinge from the hips into a forward fold, feeling a gentle stretch along the hamstrings. Maintain steady breathing while in the stretch.
3.Exhale with control to return to an upright seated position, keeping the feet flexed and the pelvis stable.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691228783.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine and stable pelvis, avoiding overarching the lower back."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly while in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch along the legs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.
2.Lengthen the spine as much as possible, avoiding a collapsed lower back.

actionLibraryList.title: Chest Stretch
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Lightly engage the core, keep the pelvis neutral and stable, lengthen the spine, and let the shoulders relax down.
2.Inhale to prepare. With both arms straight, stack them in front of the body to one side, keeping the elbows extended and the shoulder blades stable. Exhale as the rib cage leads the upper body into an open rotation to the opposite side, reaching the top arm back behind the body. Lift and open the sternum to feel a gentle stretch across the front of the chest and shoulders. Breathe evenly.
3.Exhale with control to return to neutral and repeat on the other side.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770691265549.jpg","context":"1.Keep your shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Keep the pelvis stable."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch across the front of the chest and shoulders.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
2.Keep the pelvis neutral and level.

actionLibraryList.title: Child Pose
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a kneeling position with the knees hip-width apart. Press the tops of the feet into the mat, sit the hips back toward the heels, and keep the pelvis stable.
2.Lengthen the spine, then hinge forward from the hips. Gently rest the forehead on the mat, extending the arms forward or placing them alongside the body to allow a gentle stretch through the lats and lower back. Keep the hips as close to the heels as possible and breathe evenly throughout the stretch.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1770690951913.jpg","context":"1.Keep the shoulders relaxed and down.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine with a stable pelvis."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe evenly in the stretch.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch along the spine.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection:
1.Avoid shrugging the shoulders.
2.Avoid arching the lower back.
